items.rationale: Sees the steady drumbeat of L2 progress reducing Ethereum fees and increasing throughput as a core primitive snapping into place, comparing it to platform inflection points like Web1/Web2.

citations.quote: Continued drumbeat of L2 progress in terms of reducing Ethereum transaction fees and increasing throughput- @optimism, @zksync, @arbitrum, impending EIP 4844

items.rationale: Repeatedly flags zero-knowledge proof advances as 'a big, big deal'; excited about SNARK performance leaps (Lasso/Jolt) and proof verification scaling as foundational crypto infrastructure.
items.age_note: Earliest enthusiasm 2023-08; restated 2023-11 and via 2024-03 cohort (nebrazkp, taralli, Spire), so current not stale.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Translation for folks who aren't fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.

items.rationale: Views reduced new-user onboarding friction through embedded wallets and smart-account tooling as a key accelerant for consumer adoption.

citations.quote: Reduced new user onboarding friction through embedded wallets- @privy, @dynamic_xyz
Delighted that we're expanding and deepening our relationship with @pimlicoHQ!

items.rationale: Calls EigenLayer's vision 'truly next level' and lists robust AltDA capabilities as an emerging primitive on the near horizon.

citations.quote: What @eigencloud and @sreeramkannan are building and envisioning is truly next level. Beyond excited to have the opportunity to work together.
Increasingly robust AltDA capabilites on the horizon- @eigencloud, @CelestiaOrg

items.rationale: Singles out Farcaster Frames as super-simple, fun app development and repeatedly cites Farcaster's unpredictable traction as proof of onchain social's momentum.

citations.quote: Super simple (and fun!) app development- @farcaster_xyz Frames
it would have been almost impossible to predict the traction & growth of @farcaster during the intervening 12 months

items.rationale: Sees fascinating interplay between crypto and AI/ML as an early-innings opportunity; reflected in cohort selections around verifiable AI workflows and trusted data for AI models.
items.age_note: First voiced 2023-04-05; reaffirmed via 2024-03-26 cohort (0xHungryCats, ValyuNetwork), so view persists and is current.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML

items.rationale: Backs founders building autonomous worlds and on-chain game frameworks; praises Proof of Play founder's ability to see around corners.

citations.quote: Delighted that @a16zcrypto is leading the @ProofOfPlay seed round!

items.rationale: Names DePIN as a core sector advancing the ecosystem; earlier celebrated Filecoin's FVM as advancing decentralized storage and compute.
items.age_note: Filecoin/FVM enthusiasm is from 2023-03-14 and never restated (persisted); DePIN named in 2024-03-26 cohort framing.

citations.quote: advance core sectors of the crypto ecosystem, including infrastructure, consumer apps, DeFi, payments, games, dev tools, and DePIN
today's launch of #FVM. This is a tremendous step forward in advancing the capabilities of decentralized storage and compute

items.rationale: Personally excited about Apple Vision Pro solving prior VR/AR limitations; predicts living-room monitors, immersive sports and travel media will be sticky early use cases. Adjacent personal interest, not a crypto thesis.

citations.quote: What today feels like a very high price will be remembered as noise in the system.

items.rationale: Frames regulation as a live challenge: praises the UK as 'on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation' — an implicit contrast that signals concern about US regulatory ambiguity rather than direct alarm.
items.age_note: Inferred from positive UK framing (2023-09-19) and interest in SEC v Ripple coverage; no explicit statement of US regulatory concern.

citations.quote: we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

items.rationale: Bullish on Ethereum's scaling trajectory — L2 fee reduction plus the impending EIP-4844 mainnet release — as the platform layer maturing toward mass adoption.

citations.quote: impending EIP 4844 release to mainnet ... Historically, the confluence of these kinds of platform elements has been a major accelerant

items.rationale: Names Optimism among the L2s driving the fee/throughput progress he is energized by; separately welcomed working to scale the Optimism ecosystem.

citations.quote: Very, very excited to have the opportunity to work with @Fwiz again as he works to scale the @optimismFND ecosystem.

items.rationale: Lists Arbitrum among the L2s whose progress in lowering Ethereum fees and raising throughput he finds energizing.

risk_regime.rationale: As of Q1 2024 Jason is consistently and vividly bullish: he is 'energized by the rate at which key crypto primitives are snapping into focus,' draws explicit Web1/Web2 platform-inflection parallels, is actively expanding accelerator cohorts across London and NYC, and frames crypto as early-innings. His concerns are operational (scaling too early, unit economics, executive hiring), not macro/market risk-off signals.

notes: Jason is an a16z crypto operating partner / Crypto Startup School leader, so his public corpus is dominated by founder-coaching threads (management, hiring, boards, PMF) and portfolio congratulations rather than explicit investment theses — sector/token reads are inferred from what he chooses to amplify. He rarely names tradeable tokens; ETH/OP/ARB are surfaced as ecosystems he is excited about, mapped to tokens with low certainty. His sharpest, most recent signal is the 2024-02-09 'primitives snapping into focus' post, which anchors the L2 / wallet-onboarding / AltDA / Farcaster cluster. No genuine reversals found in the corpus; older one-off enthusiasms (Filecoin FVM 2023-03, crypto+AI 2023-04) persist and are at most lightly reaffirmed. He expresses essentially no crypto-market concern — concerns are operational or about non-crypto topics (academia, AI-villain film tropes), which were excluded. Vision Pro/AR-VR is included as a clear personal excitement though it is not a crypto sector.
